base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_medusa_head_float — a character (playable) from 1986 castlevania. Disembodied stone snake-hair head — 2-frame hair-writhe. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Disembodied stone snake-hair head — 2-frame hair-writhe; drifts in slow sine-wave across screen; notorious knockback enemy. Many levels, dense in Clock Tower (Lvl 6)
